results.rendered_html: rāja—rṣi m. (for -riṣi) a royal Ṛṣi or saint, Ṛṣi of royal descent, that holy and superhuman personage which a k˚ or man of the military class may become by the performance of great austerities (e.g. Purū-ravas, Viśvā-mitra &c.; cf. devarṣi and brahma-rṣi),  ŚrS. ;  Mn. ;  MBh.  &c.
